title: Mario Party 7: Minecraft Edition Mod
description: This mod adds music discs, game items, block spaces, future working orbs, and a working record player! This mod works along with the map I'm creating on Planet Minecraft.
body:
This mod adds all **86 music tracks**, along with the blocks/spaces, Game Items, a placeholder for future working orbs, and a working Record Player for the Duty-Free Shop that plays character sound effects from the game!

Originally, I had only intended to create a map in Minecraft 1.12.2, but then I finally found a way to create a mod, so I added in what I didn't have before:

- 86 music tracks as their own music discs.
- Board spaces as blocks.
- Items used in the game like stars, coins, and more!
- A working record player that I designed in BlockBench to play some character sound effects at the moment.
- Eventually working orbs! (The Fireball Orb places carpet where it lands currently).
